---
title: "Sarah Angelina Acland"
---

## Sarah Angelina Acland

**Dates:** (1849-1931)

### Description

photographer, daughter of Sir Henry Wentworth Acland

### Letters

- [To Christabel Rose Coleridge, Aug 25 [1899]](../letters/3420_To_Christabel_Rose_Coleridge.html)
- Letter from Jan 10th 1893

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
